note: Image-space seed points for enclosed background gaps inside her hair (see flatten-character-assets.js). These target the FORMAL outfit (assets/character root): first four = the left/right hair gaps shared by the eight normal frames; last four = the same gaps where 威胁.png's pose shifts them. The CASUAL outfit (assets/character/casual, the mint dress) ships pre-flattened with no enclosed gaps and is not processed by the flatten script. CAUTION for any future art: enclosed near-white components include her face, dress panels, butterfly ornament, collar whites and eye glints — never bulk-clear near-white regions, always pick seeds after --inspect.
